All iCloud – 185 notes Folders May 28, 2026 at 11:53 PM I was writing “Natural Monopoly Analysis” not only because it was an assigned essay by my teacher, but also because I am really interested in the economic logic behind an energy company. The hardest part was writing the essay in a structured and persuasive way that proves my idea.  I was surprised by the numbers while I was doing the research about this company, 7.7 billion in spending.  I am also really distressed by the result after the research, Duke Energy’s price is actually lower than others’, which means I can’t just say Duke Energy’s price is too high. After that, I turned to other aspects: why did the price rise? Should the residents pay for the rising price?

I was writing “Why I'm Building a Copy of Myself” because I never write any creative writing except school, exam-required writing. Taking the writing sample 2 as a great opportunity, I initiated my first “creative writing.”  It is a coding project I was recently working on; I hope it can also be my first entrepreneurial project. 
While I saw Haichen lose our vibration of creativity, I felt really sad and disappointed. I can’t believe experiences can change a person in this way. 
The first draft of this essay is basically full of tech vocabulary, and I handed it to my friend, and even he found it hard to understand. Therefore, I rewrote it. This time, I focused on “the importance of experience.” This article also expresses the reason why I made this project. I hope that after people read through it, they will understand my intention, not just full of tech stacks and algorithms.
